emergency_definition: visible water damage from a ceiling caused by a sprinkler

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_if_no_answer: Client: Let the caller know help is coming and someone will reach them within 10 minutes. We're very responsive.

integration_constraints: Do not automatically create jobs automatically in servicetrade
Do not automatically create jobs at all automatically in servicetrade
Do not automatically create any jobs at all automatically in servicetrade
Do not automatically create any jobs in any integrated system
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, confirm emergency status, collect name/phone/address if emergency, attempt transfer to on-call contact, fallback to callback promise if transfer fails; for non-emergency collect details and promise next-business-day follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, ask purpose, collect name and phone number, route or transfer to appropriate team, fallback if transfer fails, confirm next steps, offer anything else, close call.
notes: Extracted from demo call transcript: demo_003.txt | ONBOARDING NOTES: Clara must clearly state the company name during the greeting.
